Product Details:

Material: blended
Fabric main component: polyester fiber (polyester)
Fabric main component content: 92
Fabric sub-component: Polyurethane elastic fiber (spandex)
Product Category: Slipcover
Style: modern simplicity
pattern: plain

Applicable sofa type: sectional sofa
Size: single position [90-140cm], double position [145-185cm], three people [195-230cm], four-person position [235-300cm], 45*45cm pillowcase without core, 45*45cm pillow Core
